name: google-forms-mcp
description: MCP server providing semantic operations for Google Forms editor

browser.visible: Attach to user's running Chrome via CDP (default)

data.user: Use user's Chrome profile with credentials and stored data (default)
data.sandbox: Use a clean browser profile with no stored data

operations.name: health_check
operations.description: Check connectivity to Google Forms

operations.name: show_scripts
operations.description: List all JavaScript functions used by this MCP server

operations.name: get_form_info
operations.description: Get form title, description, URL, question count, save status

operations.name: list_forms
operations.description: List recent forms from the homepage

operations.name: create_form
operations.description: Create a new blank form

operations.name: create_form_from_template
operations.description: Create a form from a named template

operations.name: open_form
operations.description: Open an existing form by name

operations.name: set_form_title
operations.description: Set the form title in the header

operations.name: set_form_description
operations.description: Set the form description text

operations.name: set_document_title
operations.description: Set the document name (browser tab/Drive)

operations.name: add_question
operations.description: Add a new question with optional text and type

operations.name: set_question_text
operations.description: Set text of the currently focused question

operations.name: set_question_type
operations.description: Change question type (short answer, multiple choice, etc.)

operations.name: add_option
operations.description: Add an option to a multiple-choice/checkbox/dropdown question

operations.name: toggle_required
operations.description: Toggle Required on the focused question

operations.name: duplicate_question
operations.description: Duplicate the focused question

operations.name: delete_question
operations.description: Delete the focused question

operations.name: add_section
operations.description: Add a section divider

operations.name: add_title_description
operations.description: Add a title and description block

operations.name: set_theme_color
operations.description: Set the form accent color

operations.name: set_background_color
operations.description: Set the form background color

operations.name: toggle_quiz_mode
operations.description: Toggle Make this a quiz in settings

operations.name: set_collect_emails
operations.description: Set email collection mode

operations.name: toggle_limit_responses
operations.description: Toggle Limit to 1 response

operations.name: set_confirmation_message
operations.description: Set the post-submission confirmation message

operations.name: get_response_count
operations.description: Get the number of form responses

operations.name: preview_form
operations.description: Open form preview in a new tab

operations.name: undo
operations.description: Undo the last editing action

operations.name: redo
operations.description: Redo the last undone action

operations.name: navigate_tab
operations.description: Switch between Questions, Responses, Settings tabs
